\boxed{B}

The action itself (using online forums to date) is morally neutral—it depends on intent, respect for others, and adherence to ethical standards (e.g., honesty, consent, and avoiding exploitation). The morality hinges on how the interaction unfolds, not the method alone. If done with integrity, it can be acceptable; if misused (e.g., manipulation or disrespect), it becomes unethical.
